description: UK's largest online pharmacy providing prescription delivery, online GP services, and medication management. Pioneered online pharmacy services in UK with NHS e-prescription integration.
business_model: B2C - Online pharmacy; B2B - Corporate prescription services
target_market: UK consumers and employers seeking convenient pharmacy services
competitive_advantage: First mover in UK online pharmacy, NHS integration, national delivery

varden_fit.rationale: Major UK pharmacy player - potential partner for medication-related occupational health services
